overall.description: First-person perspective walk through a futuristic cyberpunk urban plaza at night, featuring vibrant holographic light displays overhead, pedestrians resting on benches, and lush vegetation. The scene transitions from a wide covered pedestrian area to a narrow walkway alongside a busy city street, with consistent neon lighting and modern architecture throughout.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian plaza with holographic art installation

events.description: holographic overhead banners shift from green-yellow to purple lighting

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the plaza, descending stairs and proceeding toward the street intersection

notable_agents.action: woman in white dress sitting on orange bench looking at phone
man in casual clothing sitting and observing the plaza

entered.detail: colorful swirling light strips suspended overhead creating a canopy effect
dense tropical plants and trees in raised white planters along the left side
modern orange seating with people resting, featuring perforated metal backs
reflective tiled ground surface with scattered papers and debris

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person descent into a covered cyberpunk plaza illuminated by vibrant holographic banners overhead. Lush vegetation lines the left side while orange benches occupy the right, with sparse pedestrians sitting and relaxing. The lighting shifts to purple around the 6-second mark as the camera proceeds forward through the semi-enclosed space.

scene_state.functional_zone: plaza intersection with city street access

events.description: exits the covered plaza and approaches the city street intersection with visible traffic
turns right onto the narrow walkway alongside the elevated roadway

agents.ego_description: reaching the end of the plaza, observing the street traffic, and executing a right turn onto the narrow pedestrian walkway

notable_agents.action: cars moving along the city street visible beyond the plaza edge
pedestrian in green jacket walking in the opposite direction toward the plaza

entered.detail: multi-lane road with moving traffic and illuminated vehicles
modern skyscrapers with illuminated windows lining the street
tall concrete wall replacing the vegetation planters along the walkway

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges from the covered plaza into an open intersection where the city street becomes visible. Moving vehicles pass on the right while modern skyscrapers rise in the background. The vegetation and benches fall away as the camera turns right onto a narrower walkway defined by a concrete retaining wall on the left and a road barrier on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow pedestrian walkway between concrete wall and elevated roadway

events.description: walkway becomes more sparse with fewer pedestrians and more scattered debris on the ground
pedestrian in red jacket passes close to camera temporarily blocking the view

agents.ego_description: proceeding along the narrow walkway, passing seated individuals on benches and approaching a distant figure near the end of the corridor

notable_agents.action: man with green hair sitting on bench looking at phone
child in colorful outfit walking ahead in the distance

entered.detail: red and white safety barrier separating walkway from the elevated road
metal floor grates set into the paved walkway surface

segments.scene_description: The final segment follows a narrow, enclosed walkway flanked by a concrete wall on the left and a road barrier on the right. The holographic banners continue overhead but appear more distant. Sparse pedestrians sit on occasional benches, and the environment becomes increasingly sparse with scattered debris on the ground as the camera progresses toward a distant figure at the walkway's end.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a lush, sheltered cyberpunk plaza into a starker, narrow urban corridor. It begins with a descent into a covered space where vibrant holographic banners glow overhead, flanked by lush vegetation on the left and pedestrians relaxing on orange benches. As the camera proceeds forward, the lighting shifts to a deep purple before the scene opens into a wide intersection featuring passing vehicles and towering modern skyscrapers. The camera then turns right, leaving the greenery behind to enter a narrow walkway constrained by a concrete retaining wall and a road barrier. Finally, the environment becomes increasingly sparse and littered with debris as the camera moves beneath distant holograms toward a lone figure at the end of the path.
